name: PatchSubscriptionRequest
description: Implementation of the 'PatchSubscriptionRequest' model. A request to patch update a subscription

eventIds.description: A list of event IDs that you want to update or subscribe to.

eventSchemaVersion.description: The event schema version associated with the subscription. Currently, this is always `1`.

referenceId.description: An arbitrary field that you can set to a value of your choice. Mindbody stores and returns this value for the subscription you are activating. Most commonly, this field stores a GUID that you can use in your application.

status.description: The subscription’s current status, as of the last update.

webhookUrl.description: The URL registered as the target of the webhook deliveries. Mindbody posts the event notifications to this URL. Webhook URL Requirements lists considerations and requirements for this URL.
